articles.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
articles.summary: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.

articles.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
articles.summary: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.
